art_market.global_sales_outlook: Global art market reached $59.6B in 2025 (+4% growth). Asian market showing resilience despite regional instability, with South Korea posting 6% gains.
art_market.key_trends: Market focuses on intra-regional trade; Seoul and Hong Kong remain critical hubs. New trust-building initiatives like '20! 2026 Art Seoul' are attempting to stabilize the local market.
art_market.recent_events: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 preparations continue amid geopolitical focus; ongoing domestic fairs in Seoul emphasizing contemporary abstraction and digital accessibility.

stock_market.market_sentiment: Bearish sentiment driven by Middle East geopolitical tensions and energy supply fears.
stock_market.key_factors: KOSPI plummeted 6.5% on March 23 due to Iran-US geopolitical risks; Korean Won hit 1517.3 against USD (lowest since 2009). Government planning 25 trillion won supplementary budget.
